title: Receptionist (2.1k|Central)
description:
Responsibilities

  • Greet and manage walk‑in customers; guide them through the sign‑up/onboarding process
  • Collect and verify customer documents following KYC/AML and company policies; ensure data accuracy
  • Process sign-ups in CRM/onboarding systems
  • Explain product features, eligibility, fees, and terms clearly; assist with basic app installation and usage
  • Manage queues and appointment slots to maintain target wait times
  • Escalate exceptions, risk flags, or system issues to the branch lead or support teams
  • Maintain daily logs, checklists, and audit‑ready records; comply with SOPs and data privacy requirements
  • Support cross-sell/upsell of relevant services when appropriate and approved
  • Maintain counter cleanliness, device readiness, and adequate stock of forms/consumables

Qualifications

  • Detail‑oriented; ensures information provided to partners is accurate on the first attempt
  • Proficient with computers/smartphones and comfortable using CRM/onboarding portals
  • High attention to detail; able to follow SOPs in a fast‑paced environment
  • Skilled in customer service, active listening, and clear verbal communication
  • Accurate in data entry and document verification

Next Step

  • Drop your resume and contact us to follow-up, or send your resume to isaac.tanye@adecco.com
  • Email Topic: Receptionist
  • Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted

Isaac Tan Yang En

EA Licence No: 91C2918

postedCompany.description:
The Adecco Group is the world's leading provider of HR solutions. With over 35,000 FTE employees and over 5,200 branches, in over 60 countries and territories around the world, we offer a wide variety of services, connecting more than 650,000 associates with over 100,000 clients every day.

The services we offer fall into the broad categories of temporary staffing, permanent placement, career transition and talent development, as well as outsourcing and consulting. The Adecco Group is based in Zurich-Glattbrugg, Switzerland and we are a Fortune Global 500 company listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.
postedCompany.name: ADECCO PERSONNEL PTE LTD

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
